parameters: \ctHey, you're not a Sand Stomper! Did
Henry send you? I was undercover, but
they caught me trying to steal some
\p4These look like the documents we need!
Let's get out of here and bring these
\p4This is waaay easier than the Banditos' locks...
let me pick this real quick.
\>A small rodent attracted to the scent of your potatoes.
\>A nice cellmate to peel some potatoes for you.
\>Bribe a guard to bring in shipments of potatoes from the outside.
\>Keep a growing record of your most interesting spuds. Spend \ii[293]\c[0]es to unlock permanent upgrades!
\>What began as boredom has evolved into tradition. The chanting helps pass the time.
